arts.ttl: Revealed: Sir Alex Ferguson's 'emotional nursing home visits' to Denis Law weeks before Man United legend's death
arts.sum: On Friday night, Denis Law's family announced his death at 84 years old. The Manchester United legend passed away after a hard-fought, three-year battle with vascular dementia and Alzheimer's.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Brighton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United host Brighton in the Premier League today bidding to continue an upturn in results. After battling to a point at Liverpool, United dumped Arsenal out of the FA Cup last weekend before a 3-1 win over Southampton on Thursday night.
